info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: Dvanayedityadantasya DvaneH Sabde Dvanet Sapi ' (Slo. 126) iti devaH  amittvArTakaH ayaM DAtuH (828) ityatra drazwavyaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: apapUrvasyAsya cCAndogyopanizadi prayogaH- 'apaDvAntaM varuRasya' (2.22.1) visvaro gAnaviSezaH
